headline: Solventum to Participate in the 2026 Jefferies Healthcare Conference
summary: Solventum (NYSE: SOLV) announced today that management will participate in a fireside chat at the Jefferies Healthcare Conference on Wednesday, Jun. 3, 2026, beginning at approximately 9:55 a.m. EDT in New York, NY.
